description_long: This rifle features a modern design with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The stock is a skeletonized thumbhole style, made from a material resembling wood or a wood composite, with cutouts for reduced weight and improved ergonomics. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving the rifle a robust and tactical appearance. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating semi-automatic or bolt-action operation. The barrel is long and straight, with no visible muzzle device attached at the end. The overall color scheme is a combination of dark brown and black, with a matte finish that reduces glare.
description: A modern rifle with a skeletonized thumbhole stock, mounted scope, detachable box magazine, and a long matte black barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and scope, with the stock and magazine barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the skeletonized thumbhole stock, mounted scope, detachable box magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the scope, with the barrel extending away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock cutouts and scope.
